query: I trained a logistic regression on spam vs ham. I have y_true and y_pred_proba as NumPy arrays — about 8,000 messages, roughly balanced (positive rate around 0.45). Evaluate the classifier.
expected_behavior: Names ROC + PR + calibration (reliability diagram) as required plots, not just one of them
Names a threshold sweep across multiple thresholds (NOT defaulting to 0.5) and explains threshold selection
Names bootstrap-resampled 95% confidence intervals on AUC (or F1), not point estimates alone
